title: Structural entropy for neural time-series forecasting
hypothesis: Integrate structural entropy into N-BEATS, N-BEATSx, and TimesNet to improve long-horizon forecasting.

title: Structural entropy regularizer for N-BEATS blocks
hypothesis: A structural entropy penalty over learned decomposition components may improve diversity and generalization across horizons.

title: NBEATSx-DC: Community-Detection Feature Selection for Neural Time-Series Forecasting
hypothesis: Spectral decomposition + mutual-information graph + community detection selects relevant exogenous variables before NBEATSx backbone, improving forecasting on datasets with physical redundancy (Jena climate) while degrading gracefully on uniform datasets (ETT).
